steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content:
Subtract $5$ from both sides, then divide by $3$:
$$
17=3x+5
$$
$$
12=3x
$$
$$
x=4
$$

steps.title: Count the solution
steps.content: The equation gives one value of $x$. Since the coefficient of $x$ is nonzero, there cannot be infinitely many solutions or no solution. The answer is B.
